title: lilium philadelphicum subsp. typicum
intro: Lilium philadelphicum subsp. typicum, also known as the American Tiger Lily, is a perennial plant species within the lily family that is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Lilium philadelphicum subsp. typicum include reducing inflammation, fighting infection, and alleviating symptoms of colds and coughs, as well as being used to treat digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made from the flowers, leaves, and roots, and are often used to create teas, salves, and topical treatments.
